name: Pattern Array Specificity Ordering
description: When using an ordered array of regex patterns for classification (e.g., action detection, error categorization), place more-specific patterns before general ones. Like CSS specificity: context_click must come before click, or the general pattern will match first.

trigger.errorMessage: A general pattern in an ordered array matches before a more specific pattern (e.g., 'click' matches 'right-click' before 'context_click' pattern runs)

steps.description: Reorder the pattern array so more-specific patterns come first. Sort by specificity: compound terms before simple terms, multi-word before single-word, prefixed before bare.
Add test cases for both the specific and general inputs to verify correct ordering.
